text.p: Hello,
I checked and compared Prof's numbers. I'm on track, I think. Later then. Bye.
Hello ,

I say'AMEN' to your prayer. I'm sorry for keeping you awake, but I had no choice. I see my threat worked wonders. Thanks, dear for replying me pronto. I knew I could count on you. I look forward to reading from you on the other issues raised.

Meanwhile, I just received the original of my E-ticket. I liked the bit in your mail about being'better late than never, for this kind of... opportunity' That's a lot of challenge, I must say. But, thank you.I need the push. Please keep in touch. I'll pray for strength, and do my utmost.
Regards,
Hello ,
I forgive you for not replying my last mail, but you must reply this, failing which I'll have no choice but to withdraw my last promise.

A lot has happened concerning the workshop next month, but I can't say I'm on track yet. What worries me most is the visa. I've applied and gotten an appointment date - 12th - , but it's so close to depature -14th - that I'm worried. I've barred my mind to Prof . They asked for advice and I gave them yours and added name's, to contact the embassey and their servants in Nigeria, to ensure it is not delayed. They did, but I don't think they're getting any positive responses. Anyway, I've asked them to keep trying. Meanwhile, I'm carrying on with my preparations, believing that I'll be helped.
Prof has asked for data on Nigerian English. I'm sure you're familiar with the request. Please, give me hints on how to go about this and what to garther.

I've also been sent maps and directions on how to get to various locations in . No human guides? I sincerely hope I won't get missing in transit
o. There are other things I'ld like yo discus and clarify with you, as soon as I arrive ( by HIS GRACE ), and can contact you. I've been sent a provissional timetable too. Meanwhile, if there are any other things I ought to know, don't fail to aquaint me please.
Hope I have your promise to reply this mail, no joking.
Regards,

I surely am willing to award you that Ph.D now, for succeeding in cracking my ribs with laughter, all through your mail, and all the way from Poland too. It's no mean feat, I assure you. When you return, I'll vote that you be allowed to open an autonomous department of humour.

So, how are you? I'm just about applying for my visa, now that the passport is ready. Thanks for all your tips, and the encouragement about U.I. I'll visit them in the coming week to put a few things in place before my journey.

The new H.O D is Dr. B.A. . I just received a copy of my e - ticket via email. I'm told the original copy has been sent today by express. Just pray that things work out for me. I'll keep in touch, while looking forward to seeing you. Bye.
Regards,
Hello ,
I just read your mail. Did you write it in Nigerian or Esan or Igbo English? I need to be sure, to enable me respond fully.

Thanks for your extra tips. As my supervisor suddenly decided to travel out'indefinitely', I don't know what to say about . Meanwhile ' I'm eager to be in next month, and look forward to seeing you.I'm praying and trying to get my papers. The CorPus team are willing to ease my troubles. We'll talk in Germany. Greetings from . Bye.
Sincerely,
Hello,
My last mail came to you before I could even complete it. I can't explain it. Anyway, here is Mrs 's address, as well as Gladys'.
All the best always.
Sincerely,
